headline: AI will boost productivity so ServiceNow won't have to backfill open jobs, CEO says
summary: ServiceNow's stock has slumped this year, along with other software names, as AI has threatened to disrupt the industry's business model.

headline: Uber and Block Expand Global Partnership to Transform Restaurant Operations and Launch Cash App Pay
summary: DISTRIBUTED WORKFORCE/OAKLAND, Calif. & SAN FRANCISCO, April 22, 2026--Block, Inc. (NYSE: XYZ) today announced a comprehensive global partnership with Uber Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: UBER) that expands restaurant operations capabilities across multiple markets and payment flexibility in the U.S. This partnership demonstrates Block's ecosystem approach to serving both sides of the counter, bringing Square's native Uber Eats integration to international markets, while introducing Cash App Pay1 to U
